mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.card_id) FROM CARDS c
LEFT JOIN CARD_KEYWORDS ck ON c.card_id = ck.card_id AND ck.deleted_yn = 'N' LEFT JOIN SEARCH_KEYWORDS sk ON ck.keyword_id = sk.keyword_id AND sk.deleted_yn = 'N'
WHERE c.card_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND c.visible_yn = 'Y' AND c.searchable_yn = 'Y' AND c.deleted_yn = 'N' AND c.publish_start_at <= SYSTIMESTAMP AND (c.publish_end_at IS NULL OR c.publish_end_at >= SYSTIMESTAMP)
AND ( c.card_name LIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' OR c.summary_description LIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' OR c.company_name LIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' OR sk.keyword LIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' )
SELECT * FROM CARDS WHERE card_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND visible_yn = 'Y' AND deleted_yn = 'N' ORDER BY view_count DESC FETCH FIRST 3 ROWS ONLY

SELECT DISTINCT c.* FROM CARDS c JOIN CARD_BENEFITS cb ON c.card_id = cb.card_id WHERE cb.category_id = #{categoryId} AND c.card_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND c.visible_yn = 'Y' AND c.deleted_yn = 'N' AND cb.visible_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY c.view_count DESC FETCH FIRST 3 ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.card_id) FROM CARDS c
LEFT JOIN CARD_KEYWORDS ck ON c.card_id = ck.card_id LEFT JOIN SEARCH_KEYWORDS sk ON ck.keyword_id = sk.keyword_id AND sk.deleted_yn = 'N'
WHERE c.deleted_yn = 'N'
AND c.card_name LIKE '%' || #{cardName} || '%'
AND c.company_name LIKE '%' || #{companyName} || '%'
AND c.card_type = #{cardType}
AND c.card_status = #{cardStatus}
AND ( c.card_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR c.company_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR sk.keyword LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
mapper.insert:
SELECT card_id FROM CARDS WHERE card_code = #{cardCode} FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
INSERT INTO CARDS ( card_code, card_type, card_name, company_name, company_code, brand_name, annual_fee_domestic, annual_fee_overseas, previous_month_spend, minimum_age, maximum_age, credit_limit_min, credit_limit_max, target_user, summary_description, searchable_yn, visible_yn, approval_required_yn, card_status, publish_start_at, publish_end_at, application_count, view_count, created_by, created_at, deleted_yn ) VALUES ( #{cardCode}, #{cardType}, #{cardName}, #{companyName}, NVL(#{companyCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '01'), #{brandName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{annualFeeDomestic}, #{annualFeeOverseas, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{previousMonthSpend, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{minimumAge, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{maximumAge, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{creditLimitMin, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{creditLimitMax, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{targetUser, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{summaryDescription, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NVL(#{searchableYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, 'Y'), NVL(#{visibleYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, 'Y'), NVL(#{approvalRequiredYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, 'Y'), NVL(#{cardStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'DRAFT'), #{publishStartAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{publishEndAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, 0, 0, #{createdBy, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSTIMESTAMP, 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE CARDS SET card_type = #{cardType}, card_name = #{cardName}, company_name = #{companyName}, company_code = #{companyCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, brand_name = #{brandName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, annual_fee_domestic = #{annualFeeDomestic}, annual_fee_overseas = #{annualFeeOverseas, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, previous_month_spend = #{previousMonthSpend, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, minimum_age = #{minimumAge, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, maximum_age = #{maximumAge, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, credit_limit_min = #{creditLimitMin, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, credit_limit_max = #{creditLimitMax, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, target_user = #{targetUser, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, summary_description = #{summaryDescription, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, searchable_yn = #{searchableYn}, visible_yn = #{visibleYn}, approval_required_yn = #{approvalRequiredYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, card_status = #{cardStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, publish_start_at = #{publishStartAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, publish_end_at = #{publishEndAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_by = #{updatedBy, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE card_id = #{cardId}
UPDATE CARDS SET card_status = 'APPROVED', updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE card_id = #{cardId}
UPDATE CARDS SET card_status = #{cardStatus}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE card_id = #{cardId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM CARDS WHERE deleted_yn = 'N' ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE CARDS SET card_status = 'STOPPED', deleted_yn = 'Y', deleted_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE card_id = #{cardId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM CARDS WHERE publish_end_at < SYSTIMESTAMP AND card_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND deleted_yn = 'N'
SELECT * FROM CARDS WHERE card_status = 'APPROVED' AND publish_start_at <= SYSTIMESTAMP AND deleted_yn = 'N'
mapper.update:
UPDATE CARDS SET card_status = 'PUBLISHED', updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE card_id IN
#{id}

UPDATE CARDS SET card_status = 'EXPIRED', updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE card_id IN
#{id}
